goals: Goal 1 — The Gate: catch banned users rejoining on new accounts at verification
Goal 2 — The Watcher: stylometry profiles flag members matching banned users

verification_suite.description: Run ALL of these before marking any task done or emitting completion promise

loop_rules: Read tasks/prd.json and git log --oneline -5 before doing anything
Pick exactly ONE task with status pending (lowest id first)
Set that task status to in_progress in prd.json, commit nothing yet
Implement only what that task describes — no scope creep
Run the task verification command, then the full verification_suite
If verification fails: fix within the same iteration, do not mark done
If verification passes: set task status to done in prd.json, update tasks/todo.md checkbox if applicable
Do NOT output the completion promise until every task is done AND verification_suite passes
If blocked on secrets (BOT_TOKEN, wallet): mark task blocked, document in prd.json notes, skip to next pending
Never edit .env with real secrets; only .env.example

tasks.title: Unit tests for known-bad registry matching
tasks.description: Add tests/test_matching.py covering: exact user_id block, exact fingerprint block, clean approve, keystroke similarity flag above threshold. Use in-memory SQLite async session fixtures.

tasks.title: Unit tests for verification tokens
tasks.description: Add tests/test_tokens.py: create_token returns usable token, validate_token rejects expired and used tokens, mark_token_used prevents reuse.

tasks.title: API tests for verify precheck and submit
tasks.description: Add tests/test_api_verify.py using httpx.AsyncClient against singulr.main:app. Mock or skip bot notification. Test precheck blocks when ban exists, submit rejects wrong sentence, submit approves clean user.

tasks.title: Shared pytest fixtures for async DB
tasks.description: Add tests/conftest.py with session-scoped async SQLite engine, tables created per test, dependency override for get_session in FastAPI tests.
acceptance_criteria: T001-T003 use shared fixtures without duplication

tasks.title: Verification script for Ralph iterations
tasks.description: Add scripts/verify.ps1 (Windows) and scripts/verify.sh that run pytest, ruff, and npm run compile; exit non-zero on any failure.

tasks.title: IP session pattern detection
tasks.description: When same ip_hash verifies 2+ different telegram_user_ids within 24h, return Decision.FLAG with factor ip_velocity. Add tests in test_matching.py.
acceptance_criteria: check_known_bad or helper flags IP velocity
At least 1 test for multi-account same IP

tasks.title: Rate limit token generation per user
tasks.description: Max 3 tokens per telegram_user_id per 24h. Reject or reuse logic in create_token. Test in test_tokens.py.
acceptance_criteria: Fourth token within 24h raises or returns error

tasks.title: Structured log channel messages
tasks.description: Update log_to_channel in telegram_actions.py: formatted messages for ELEVATED_RISK, BAN_EVASION, WATCHER_MATCH with risk factors and truncated fingerprint hash. Add unit test for message format strings.
acceptance_criteria: Log messages include user id, risk score/factors where applicable

tasks.title: Ban evasion auto-block on exact fingerprint precheck
tasks.description: Ensure precheck returns allowed:false before page render when fingerprint matches bans table. Integration test in test_api_verify.py.
acceptance_criteria: precheck with banned fingerprint returns allowed false
Test passes without starting Telegram bot

tasks.title: Stylometry profile accumulation tests
tasks.description: Test merge_feature_vectors across multiple messages improves similarity between same-author samples vs different-author samples in tests/test_stylometry.py.

tasks.title: Watcher match integration test
tasks.description: Test find_watcher_matches returns a match when member stylometry closely matches a banned user's profile (seed DB fixtures).

tasks.title: Mocked chain client tests
tasks.description: Add tests/test_blockchain.py mocking Web3: is_banned returns True when contract says so, record_ban skipped when chain disabled.
acceptance_criteria: ChainClient.enabled false when no contract address

tasks.title: Hardhat deploy smoke test script
tasks.description: Add scripts/smoke-chain.js that connects to CHAIN_RPC, checks chainId 2017, skips deploy if no WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY. Document in README.
acceptance_criteria: node scripts/smoke-chain.js runs without error when RPC reachable
Prints skip message when wallet not configured

tasks.title: Verification page environment consistency check
tasks.description: In static/verify.js detect obvious VM/automation signals (webdriver, headless UA). Send env_flags to submit payload; backend adds +20 risk factor env_anomaly (flag not block). Test backend scoring.
acceptance_criteria: webdriver true adds env_anomaly to risk_factors on flag path

tasks.title: FingerprintJS Pro API key support
tasks.description: When FINGERPRINT_PUBLIC_KEY set, load Pro loader; otherwise OSS. Document in README. No regression to precheck flow.
acceptance_criteria: verify.js branches on fingerprint_public_key from precheck

tasks.title: E2E manual test checklist
tasks.description: Add tasks/e2e-checklist.md with step-by-step: join request, DM link, verify page, approve, ban, rejoin block. No code changes required beyond doc.

tasks.title: Admin ban writes stylometry hash to chain
tasks.description: Ensure persist_ban in bans.py always computes stylometry_hash from profile when available. Test ban record includes stylometry_hash in DB.
acceptance_criteria: test in test_matching or test_api confirms stylometry_hash stored on admin ban

tasks.title: Health endpoint reports component status
tasks.description: Extend /health to return db_ok, bot_configured, chain_enabled booleans. Test with TestClient.
acceptance_criteria: GET /health returns JSON with those three fields
